overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game, showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through overcast grassy hills. The character encounters a horse rider on a dirt trail before continuing through open grassland toward distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed dirt path through rolling grassy hills

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up a narrow dirt trail between two grassy embankments

entered.detail: steep grassy slope covered in tall green grass and small plants
steep grassy slope with dense vegetation matching the left side
narrow worn dirt path winding uphill between the two embankments
scattered trees visible at the top of the hill against the cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks alone up a narrow dirt trail enclosed by steep grassy embankments on both sides. The overcast sky provides diffused lighting over the lush green landscape, with trees visible in the distance at the hill's crest.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with rock outcroppings

events.description: rider on horseback appears in the distance ahead on the trail
ego character slows and steps to the right side of the trail to allow passage
horse rider passes by on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking forward, then stepping aside to the right to let the approaching horse rider pass safely

notable_agents.action: riding a brown horse toward the camera and passing by on the left side

entered.detail: large gray boulder sitting on the right side of the trail surrounded by grass
hazy mountain range visible in the background beyond the immediate hills

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a wider grassland as a horse rider appears in the distance. The character approaches a large rock formation on the right and steps aside to let the rider pass. The terrain becomes more open with distant mountains visible through the haze.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the open grassland toward the distant tree line and mountains

entered.detail: cluster of trees on the left horizon marking the edge of the grassland

segments.scene_description: After the horse rider passes, the character continues through the open prairie grassland. The large rock formation recedes into the distance on the right as the character walks toward scattered trees and distant mountains under the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined hillside trail that gradually expands into a vast, open prairie. It begins with the character walking up a narrow dirt path enclosed by steep grassy embankments under a diffused, overcast sky. As the trail opens into a wider grassland, the camera tracks the character toward a large rock formation where they step aside to let a passing horse rider go by. The scene then shifts to a broader perspective of the landscape, with the rock formation receding as the character moves further into the open terrain. Finally, the view expands across the prairie toward scattered trees and distant mountains shrouded in a light haze.
